title: Rain on My Hoodie (Smutny Rap genre - shot 12)
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I woke up late again
Cold floor, same old room
Bills on the chair
And the sink full of doom
Your text stays dark
Like it never cared
I stare at my phone
Like it might still be there

[Pre-Chorus]
I keep my face up
But I’m tired inside
Too many close calls
Too many nights
I say I’m good
But that’s just a line
I’m barely moving
I’m running on time

[Chorus]
Rain on my hoodie
Rain on my mind
Rain on my hoodie
I’m falling behind
Say I’m okay
But I don’t believe me
Rain on my hoodie
Don’t leave me so easy (don’t leave me)

[Verse 2]
Mom said, “Call back”
I forgot again
Same cracked excuse
Same weight in my head
I laugh with the boys
Then I fade out fast
I keep on acting
Like pain can’t last
My shoes are worn
My hopes got holes
I patch up the day
With a lie I stole

[Pre-Chorus]
I keep my face up
But I’m tired inside
Too many close calls
Too many nights
I say I’m good
But that’s just a line
I’m barely moving
I’m running on time

[Chorus]
Rain on my hoodie
Rain on my mind
Rain on my hoodie
I’m falling behind
Say I’m okay
But I don’t believe me
Rain on my hoodie
Don’t leave me so easy (don’t leave me)

[Bridge]
If I slow down
Will it hit me hard?
All these old wounds
Still under the scar
I need one hand
Not a whole new life
Just stay a while
And don’t ask why

[Chorus]
Rain on my hoodie
Rain on my mind
Rain on my hoodie
I’m falling behind
Say I’m okay
But I don’t believe me
Rain on my hoodie
Don’t leave me so easy (don’t leave me)
